rulings.Case Title: ASIAN, INC et al VS. THE HARTFORD STEAM BOILER INSPECTION AND INSURANCE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 14, 2010, line 3, PLAINTIFFS ASIAN, INC, and, 1030 POLK ASSOCIATES MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Motion denied, failure to comply with CRC 3.1350 which requires each issue to be separately stated. Motion denied as to merits, failure to shift burden of proof. No evidence submitted establishing what expenses were necessary relocation costs. Insufficient affidavits, declarations, admissions, or answers to interrogatories submitted to support the motion. CCP section 437c(b)(1) and 437c(p)(1). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ASIAN, INC et al VS. THE HARTFORD STEAM BOILER INSPECTION AND INSURANCE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 14, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT THE HARTFORD STEAM BOILER INSPECTION AND INSURANCE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT RE: claim for punitive damages. Is denied, failure to shift the burden of proof to show that plaintiff lacks and cannot reasonably obtain clear and convincing evidence of oppression, fraud, or malice. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ASIAN, INC et al VS. THE HARTFORD STEAM BOILER INSPECTION AND INSURANCE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 14, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT THE HARTFORD STEAM BOILER INSPECTION AND INSURANCE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT re: 4th thru 6th affirmative defenses. Motion denied, failure to shift the burden of proof. Defendants motion seeks advisory opinion regarding policy interpretation that do not resolve any legal or factual disputes regarding the applicability of coverage or defendant's duty to pay or not to pay under various provisions. Defendant does not present evidence sufficient to shift the burden of proof that the replaced electrical service was not covered because it was of a better kind or quality than required. Insufficient evidence presented regarding what the laws were before the 2004 replacement, or in the interim between the 2004 and 2006 replacement. Notice of violation summarizes the violation as: "unlawful use of energy....unsafe and hazardous wiring." No evidence presented that the Ordinance or Law exclusion applies. The 6th affirmative defense is denied as defendant merely seeks an advisory opinion regarding the contract. This is not an issue or duty that can be summarily adjudicated. CCP section 437c. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: OMNICARE CONSULTING MEDICAL GROUP, INC. VS. BSML, INC., AKA BRITE SMILE, A FOREIGN CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 14, 2010, line 10, Order To Show Cause Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction. Is granted. No opposition filed. Defendant is enjoined from issuing checks in plaintiff's name, employing people in plaintiff's name or under plaintiff's identification number, and making any use of plaintiff's name. No bond required because defendant waived its rights under CCP section 529. See Smith vs. Adventist Health System West, (2010) 182 Cal.App.4th 729. =(302/CWW)
